conditions: Closest 4 ft piling at right is clear with strong texture; the 11 ft piling behind it is visible but hazy, and the 14 ft/30 ft pilings to the left are only very faint silhouettes with little detail. The 11 ft piling is not distinctly visible as a separate structure, but the 14 ft piling (center-right) appears as a very hazy silhouette with little to no texture. Farther 30 ft pilings are not discernible. According to the guidelines, a hazy/faded 14 ft piling corresponds to ~15 ft visibility.

Only the nearest 4 ft piling at right edge is clearly visible with some texture. The mid/right and farther pilings are extremely faint, essentially lost in the haze. This matches conditions where only the closest piling is clear.

Only the nearest 4 ft piling on the right edge is clearly visible with texture; farther mid and back pilings are not discernible, fading into uniform blue-green haze. This corresponds to the 5 ft visibility category.
